title: Unused SITE_NAME import creates lint noise in locale layout
reasoning: SITE_NAME is imported in the locale layout but is never referenced. The package exposes an ESLint script, and this file produces an @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars warning during lint, adding avoidable signal loss to release checks and making it easier to miss new warnings in this route group.
reproduction: Run `pnpm --dir frontend lint`; ESLint reports `frontend/src/app/[locale]/layout.tsx:11:19 warning 'SITE_NAME' is defined but never used`.
recommendation: Remove SITE_NAME from the import list unless the layout starts using it directly.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: There are no linked tests for this feature, and unit or rendering tests generally do not assert lint cleanliness.
suggestedRegressionTest: Keep `pnpm --dir frontend lint` in CI so unused imports in route modules are caught before release.
minimumFixScope: Edit frontend/src/app/[locale]/layout.tsx to import only APP_URL and buildMetadata from @/lib/metadata.
